mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 45KYJfAwvASo98o.bfca2b77e1a0 --database ePrX25nq5sECZ3f72okXeB --execute 
-- tenants 테이블 생성
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tenants (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  slug VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  status ENUM('active', 'suspended', 'trial', 'expired') DEFAULT 'trial' NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- 기본 테넌트 삽입 (우리 회사)
INSERT INTO tenants (id, name, slug, status) VALUES (1, '본사', 'headquarters', 'active');

-- 테넌트 확인
SELECT * FROM tenants;
